intentSynonyms: get a completed question count in hack2hire
look up a completed question count in hack2hire
fetch a single completed question count in hack2hire
view one specific completed question count in hack2hire
get completed question count in hack2hire
count completed questions in a scope in hack2hire
description: Get how many questions the authenticated user has marked as COMPLETED, scoped to a single dimension. Provide exactly one of `company` (uppercase company key), `type` (ALGORITHM, SD, ML_SD, BLOG), or `selectedCollectionKey` (e.g. "hack2hire-50-picks"). Useful for showing study progress against a goal.

type.description: Post type to count completed questions for.
